productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Black  Sweater
description: Composition Black v-neck sleeveless sweater made of 80% lambswool and 20% nylon, has a ribbed neck, armholes and hem and branding embroidered on the left chest Fit Regular Wash care Dry clean recommended Hand wash cold Do not bleach, wring or tumble dry Dry flat in shade Cool iron Do not iron on decorations Enjoy the chill in this sleeveless sweater from united colors of benetton. The ribbed V-neck and armholes makes this a versatile vest while the soft lambswool/nylon blended fabric keeps you feeling warm and comfortable all day long. Layer this over shirts or tees, jeans and leather slip-ons for a laid back look. Model Statistics Product is a size XL on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18&rdquo
